en: Finally, my brothers, rejoice in the Lord. To write the same things to you is no trouble to me and is safe for you.
zh: 最後，我的弟兄們，你們要靠著主喜樂。我寫這些話給你們，在我並不困難，對你們卻是妥當的。

en: Look out for the dogs, look out for the evildoers, look out for those who mutilate the flesh.
zh: 你們要提防那些“狗”，提防作惡的，提防行割禮的。

en: For we are the real circumcision, who worship by the Spirit of God and glory in Christ Jesus and put no confidence in the flesh-
zh: 其實我們這些靠 神的靈來敬拜，在基督耶穌裡誇口而不倚靠肉體的人，才是受割禮的，

en: though I myself have reason for confidence in the flesh also. If anyone else thinks he has reason for confidence in the flesh, I have more:
zh: 雖然我有理由可以倚靠肉體。如果別人認為可以倚靠肉體，我就更加可以了；

en: circumcised on the eighth day, of the people of Israel, of the tribe of Benjamin, a Hebrew of Hebrews; as to the law, a Pharisee;
zh: 我第八天受割禮，屬於以色列民族便雅憫支派，是希伯來人所生的希伯來人。按著律法來說，我是個法利賽人；

en: as to zeal, a persecutor of the church; as to righteousness, under the law blameless.
zh: 按著熱誠來說，我是迫害教會的；按著律法上的義來說，我是無可指摘的。

en: But whatever gain I had, I counted as loss for the sake of Christ.
zh: 然而以前對我有益的，現在因著基督的緣故，我都當作是有損的。

en: Indeed, I count everything as loss because of the surpassing worth of knowing Christ Jesus my Lord. For his sake I have suffered the loss of all things and count them as rubbish, in order that I may gain Christ
zh: 不但這樣，我也把萬事當作是有損的，因為我以認識我主基督耶穌為至寶。為了他，我把萬事都拋棄了，看作廢物，為了要得著基督。

en: and be found in him, not having a righteousness of my own that comes from the law, but that which comes through faith in Christ, the righteousness from God that depends on faith-
zh: 並且得以在他裡面，不是有自己因律法而得的義，而是有因信基督而得的義，就是基於信心，從 神而來的義，

en: that I may know him and the power of his resurrection, and may share his sufferings, becoming like him in his death,
zh: 使我認識基督和他復活的大能，並且在他所受的苦上有分，受他所受的死；

en: that by any means possible I may attain the resurrection from the dead.
zh: 這樣，我也許可以從死人中復活。

en: Not that I have already obtained this or am already perfect, but I press on to make it my own, because Christ Jesus has made me his own.
zh: 這並不是說我已經得著了，已經完全了，而是竭力追求，好使我可以得著基督耶穌所以得著我的 。

en: Brothers, I do not consider that I have made it my own. But one thing I do: forgetting what lies behind and straining forward to what lies ahead,
zh: 弟兄們，我不以為自己已經得著了，我只有一件事，就是忘記背後，努力前面的事，

en: I press on toward the goal for the prize of the upward call of God in Christ Jesus.
zh: 向著目標竭力追求，為要得著 神在基督耶穌裡召我往上去得的獎賞。

en: Let those of us who are mature think this way, and if in anything you think otherwise, God will reveal that also to you.
zh: 所以，我們中間凡是成熟的人，都應當這樣思想。即使你們不是這樣思想， 神也會把這事指示你們。

en: Only let us hold true to what we have attained.
zh: 不過，我們到了甚麼程度，就要照著甚麼程度去行。

en: Brothers, join in imitating me, and keep your eyes on those who walk according to the example you have in us.
zh: 弟兄們，你們要一同效法我，也要留意那些照著我們給你們的榜樣而行的人。

en: For many, of whom I have often told you and now tell you even with tears, walk as enemies of the cross of Christ.
zh: 我常常告訴你們，現在又流著淚說，有許多人行事為人，是基督十字架的仇敵，

en: Their end is destruction, their god is their belly, and they glory in their shame, with minds set on earthly things.
zh: 他們的結局是滅亡，他們的神是自己的肚腹，他們以自己的羞辱為榮耀，所思想的都是地上的事。

en: But our citizenship is in heaven, and from it we await a Savior, the Lord Jesus Christ,
zh: 但我們是天上的公民，切望救主，就是主耶穌基督，從天上降臨；

en: who will transform our lowly body to be like his glorious body, by the power that enables him even to subject all things to himself.
zh: 他要運用那使萬有歸服自己的大能，改變我們這卑賤的身體，和他榮耀的身體相似。
